detailed_description: This video showcases a person's elaborate Halloween costume, featuring striking black and white skeleton face paint, complete with a black cowboy hat and a patterned black bandana. The individual subtly poses and turns, allowing the viewer to appreciate the details of the spooky western-themed ensemble, which also includes a black denim vest. The entire clip serves as a reveal of the completed transformation.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment is kept as the semantic core because it directly demonstrates the 'Reveal/Result' of the Halloween costume and makeup. The subject is actively showcasing the complete look without any discernible setup, calibration, or post-action dead air, fulfilling the 'No-Mistake' rule. The sustained visual presentation is the primary value proposition of the video.
